stemHtml: Over the Alps, your aircraft suddenly loses altitude and airspeed drops significantly. Which statement is most accurate?

options.a: You are encountering severe mountain waves and must file a special air-report to ATC.
options.b: You must report icing if also experienced, but turbulence alone doesn't require a report.
options.c: You must report this to the meteorological office after landing.
options.d: You are in turbulence and must report only if it is severe.
